claimText: National Taiwan University guidance says students using ChatGPT for assignments or reports should clearly label AI-generated content, fact-check it, and comply with academic ethics and academic-integrity requirements.
normalizedValue: NTU central guidance requires labeling, fact-checking and academic-integrity compliance for AI-generated content

citation.citationTitle: 臺大針對生成式 AI 工具之教學因應措施
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
